name: Trek

data_sources.note: Symetra Trek RILA. Issued by Symetra Life Insurance Company (Sumitomo Life subsidiary, not PE). Three crediting methods (cap, participation, trigger) and three interest-term lengths (1-yr, 2-yr, 6-yr).
Symetra launched the Trek RILA suite June 2021. First-offered date confirmed.
Symetra Life Insurance Company AM Best FSR A (Excellent). Synthetic anchor 'A' confirmed. pe_owned=false (Sumitomo Life parent).

verification_notes: AM Best A confirmed (Sumitomo Life parent, not PE); product family confirmed via carrier press release; 1-yr 10% buffer cap 0.08 retained as conservative public-range estimate pending broker-portal rate sheet. Surrender schedule 7/6/5/4/3 retained from synthetic as it sits within the Trek suite's typical 5-yr schedule per published broker materials.
